docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF DEVDHARA, V.D. AS TO DEFENDANT HARRIS, RAYMOND SUMMONS ISSUED

MEMO TO SET FOR JURY TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF DEVDHARA, V.D. SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR APR-09-2001 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 206 SET FOR JURY TRIAL ON APR-16-2001 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED
JUDGE:MELLON CLERK:WILLIAMS REPORTER:TORREANO 2:40PM: CASE CALLED FOR COURT TRIAL IN DEPT. 210. DEFENDANT IN PRO PER. AFTER TESTIMONY,CONTINUED TO 9AM 4-17-01 FOR CONTINUED COURT TRIAL.
APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS FILED BY DEFENDANT HARRIS, RAYMOND ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS

JUDGE-MELLON; CLERK-JASMIN; REPORTER-LEATHLEY. NO APPEARANCE FOR PLAINTIFF. DEFENDANT APPEARED IPP. NO OBJECTION FROM PLAINTIFF TO STATEMENT OF DECISION. COURT ADOPTS STATEMENT OF DECISION HERETOFORE ISSUED AND SERVED TO PARTIES.
DEMAND FOR JURY FILED BY DEFENDANT HARRIS, RAYMOND
JURY TRIAL STRICKEN, TO COURT TRIAL ON APR-16-2001 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206 PER DEPARTMENT AT SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE, JURY DEMAND STRICKEN; N/A BY DEFT AT SETT. CONF.

THOMAS J. MELLON, JR, JUDGE, JASMIN, CLERK, LEATHLEY, CSR 9:30 AM.-TRIAL CONTINUES. FRED JACOBS, EARL GUILLOR AND PLAINTIFF, D.V. DEVDHARA, SWORN AND TESTIFY. PLAINTIFF RESTS PM SESSION, DOUGLAS STUBBLEFIELD, VERNON ROBSINSON AND DEFENDANT RAYMOND HARRIS, SWORN AND TESTIFY FOR DEFENDANT. BOTH PARTIES MAKE CLOSING ARGUMENTS. COURT MAKES STATEMENT OF DECISION THAT PLAINTIFF FAILED TO MEET HIS BURDEN. DEFENDANT GIVEN THE TIME ALLOWED BY THE RULES TO OBJECT TO STATEMENT AND RAISE ISSUE THAT HE WANTS THE COURT TO RULE UPON. SESSION IS ADJOURNED.
CLERKS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
